patch.value: GH-293..296 CLI parser and search regression bundle

Fix fresh GitHub issues GH-293 schema unknown subcommands mutating types, GH-294 create --tags space-separated loss, GH-295 exact-ID keyword ranking, and GH-296 docs comma path parsing. Duplicate check covered open/closed/canceled pm search results before creation; related closed lineages include pm-ablm/pm-r2kd, pm-oqgf/pm-rkie, pm-cf1u/pm-klqo, and pm-jzf4.

author: codex-agent
message: Start bundled GH-293..296 regression fixes after live GitHub and all-status pm duplicate check.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Investigation note: GitHub sweep found open issues #293, #294, #295, #296 and no open PRs. pnpm audit --audit-level moderate reported no known vulnerabilities; pnpm outdated reports commander latest 15.0.0 but wanted/current 14.0.3, retained pending Node compatibility review.

value.note: Split bare comma-separated linked file/doc add paths
Normalize dashed IDs for exact-ID search ranking

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Evidence: Focused regression suite passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/cli/bootstrap-args.spec.ts tests/unit/commands/search-command.spec.ts tests/unit/commands/files-docs-command.spec.ts tests/unit/commands/register-commands.spec.ts (271 tests). Manual temp smoke passed against dist/cli.js with isolated PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH for GH-293 schema unknown subcommand no-mutation, GH-294 create --tags alpha beta gamma, GH-296 docs comma paths, and GH-295 exact-ID search ranking.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Evidence: Full coverage gate passed after branch simplification: node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage -> 230 files, 4649 tests, Statements 100% (29732/29732), Branches 100% (23273/23273), Functions 100% (4945/4945), Lines 100% (28566/28566). Other gates passed: pnpm build, git diff --check, pnpm contracts:check, pnpm security:scan, pnpm changelog:pm:check, pnpm quality:static. pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift had ok=true and history_drift ok, with pre-existing validate_resolution_missing_fields:201 warnings.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Evidence: Static quality JSON gate confirmed source_docstring_coverage_percent=100 and exported_docstring_coverage_percent=100 (source 221/221, exported 1620/1620). pnpm version:check passed version policy 2026.6.19. Fresh GitHub sweep still shows issues #293-#296 open and no open PRs before creating this branch.

value.author: unknown
value.text: Evidence: Sentry recent check passed. Command: sentry issue list pm-cli --period 24h --query 'is:unresolved' --limit 10 --json --fields shortId,title,level,status,priority,lastSeen. Result: no unresolved pm-cli issues returned for the last 24h.
